description_long: This is a single bed with a rectangular, solid wood frame finished in a rich, reddish-brown color. The bed features a flat, vertical headboard at one end, constructed from the same wood as the frame, providing a simple yet sturdy back support. A white mattress sits atop the frame, partially covered by a brown, textured blanket that extends nearly to the foot of the bed. A single white pillow is placed at the head of the bed, aligned with the headboard. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or storage compartments. The bed appears suitable for use in urban environments such as dormitories, hostels, or minimalist apartments.
description: A minimalist single bed with a solid wood frame, white mattress, brown blanket, and a flat headboard. The design is simple and functional, with a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the headboard, and the layered bedding including the pillow and blanket.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, centered pillow, and the width of the bed with the blanket neatly covering the mattress.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the headboard, mattress, and bedding from the other side.
description_view_3: Foot view displaying the solid, flat foot of the bed frame with no footboard and the brown blanket covering the mattress.
